tasks.title: Fix AR Viewer Issues
tasks.description: Resolve connection errors and JSON parsing issues in the AR viewer to ensure proper model loading from Sanity.io CDN URLs.
tasks.details: Update the AR viewer to handle connections to Sanity.io CDN URLs instead of localhost. Ensure that USDZ files are correctly interpreted and not parsed as JSON. Implement platform-specific handling for iOS and web, and add fallbacks for unsupported formats.
tasks.testStrategy: Test AR viewer on iOS, Android, and desktop browsers to ensure models load correctly without errors. Verify fallback mechanisms work on unsupported platforms.

subtasks.title: Update Connection Handling for Sanity.io CDN
subtasks.description: Modify the AR viewer to establish and manage connections with Sanity.io CDN URLs, replacing localhost references.
subtasks.details:
Ensure the AR viewer can fetch and load models from Sanity.io CDN URLs by updating connection settings and handling potential network errors.
<info added on 2025-07-20T03:14:32.382Z>
Implemented Sanity client to dynamically fetch model CDN URLs, replacing local paths and localhost references. This resolves connection issues by utilizing the production Sanity API.
</info added on 2025-07-20T03:14:32.382Z>

subtasks.title: Ensure Proper Interpretation of USDZ Files
subtasks.description: Implement mechanisms to correctly interpret and display USDZ files, preventing them from being misparsed as JSON.
subtasks.details:
Update the AR viewer to recognize and process USDZ files appropriately, leveraging libraries or frameworks that support the USDZ format.
<info added on 2025-07-20T03:15:06.331Z>
Add logic to prevent loading USDZ files on non-iOS platforms by not setting the source attribute for web, thereby avoiding JSON parse errors.
</info added on 2025-07-20T03:15:06.331Z>

subtasks.title: Implement Platform-Specific Handling for iOS and Web
subtasks.description: Develop platform-specific code to handle AR model loading and display on both iOS and web platforms.
subtasks.details:
For iOS, integrate with AR Quick Look to display USDZ files natively. For web, implement a compatible 3D model viewer that supports USDZ or alternative formats.
<info added on 2025-07-20T03:15:24.938Z>
Implemented isIOS detection and configured platform-specific handling by using iosSrc and quick-look for iOS, while hiding the model-viewer for web platforms.
</info added on 2025-07-20T03:15:24.938Z>

subtasks.title: Add Fallbacks for Unsupported Formats
subtasks.description: Implement fallback mechanisms to handle scenarios where certain 3D model formats are unsupported on specific platforms.
subtasks.details: Detect unsupported formats and provide alternative solutions, such as converting models to a supported format or displaying a placeholder message.

subtasks.title: Conduct Comprehensive Testing Across Platforms
subtasks.description: Perform thorough testing of the AR viewer across iOS, Android, and desktop browsers to ensure correct model loading and display.
subtasks.details: Test the AR viewer on various devices and browsers to verify that models load correctly, fallbacks function as intended, and there are no errors or performance issues.

tasks.title: Improve Background Visuals
tasks.description: Redesign the landing page background to replace full-background waves with creative bubble elements for enhanced visual appeal.
tasks.details: Modify the CSS to replace the full-background waves with smaller, creatively placed bubble elements in beige and green. Ensure the design is visually appealing and consistent across devices.
tasks.testStrategy: Check the landing page on various screen sizes and devices to ensure the new background design is responsive and visually appealing.

subtasks.title: Design Creative Bubble Elements
subtasks.description: Create visually appealing bubble elements in beige and green to replace the current full-background waves on the landing page.
subtasks.details: Develop a set of bubble graphics that align with the website's aesthetic. Ensure the design is versatile for various screen sizes and devices.

subtasks.title: Implement CSS Changes for New Background
subtasks.description: Modify the CSS to integrate the newly designed bubble elements as the background of the landing page.
subtasks.details: Replace the existing full-background waves with the new bubble elements using CSS. Ensure the background is responsive and maintains visual appeal across different devices.

subtasks.title: Test Design Across Devices and Screen Sizes
subtasks.description: Verify that the new background design is responsive and visually appealing on various devices and screen sizes.
subtasks.details: Conduct thorough testing on multiple devices and screen sizes to ensure the bubble background adapts well and maintains consistency. Make necessary adjustments based on test results.

tasks.title: Remove Placeholder Testimonials
tasks.description: Comment out or remove the placeholder testimonial blocks from the landing page until real testimonials are available.
tasks.details: Locate the testimonial sections in the HTML and either comment them out or remove them entirely. Ensure the layout remains intact without these sections.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the landing page displays correctly without testimonial sections and that there are no layout issues.

subtasks.title: Locate and Remove or Comment Out Testimonial Sections
subtasks.description: Identify the testimonial sections in the HTML code and either remove them or comment them out to prevent display.
subtasks.details: Open the landing page's HTML file and search for the sections containing testimonial content. Once located, you can either delete these sections or enclose them within HTML comment tags (`<!--` and `-->`) to hide them from the browser. Ensure that the removal or commenting does not affect other parts of the page.

tasks.title: Implement Kick-Start Quiz
tasks.description: Develop a multi-step quiz to guide users and recommend products based on their answers.
tasks.details: Use vanilla JS to create a multi-step quiz with questions about pet type, yard size, frustration, and email capture. Calculate recommended bundles based on user responses and integrate with the AR viewer and waitlist features.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the quiz flow to ensure it captures user input correctly, computes recommendations accurately, and integrates seamlessly with the AR viewer and waitlist.

subtasks.title: Design Quiz Flow
subtasks.description: Outline the structure and sequence of the multi-step quiz, including question types and progression logic.
subtasks.details: Define the number of steps, types of questions (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended), and the logic for navigating between steps.

subtasks.title: Implement Quiz Steps in Vanilla JavaScript
subtasks.description: Develop each step of the quiz using vanilla JavaScript, ensuring smooth transitions and user interactions.
subtasks.details: Create functions to handle displaying questions, capturing user inputs, and navigating between steps without relying on external libraries.

subtasks.title: Integrate Quiz with AR Viewer
subtasks.description: Connect the quiz functionality with the AR viewer to display relevant 3D models based on user responses.
subtasks.details: Implement logic to trigger the AR viewer with appropriate models corresponding to quiz answers, ensuring seamless integration.

subtasks.title: Capture and Store User Data
subtasks.description: Implement mechanisms to collect and securely store user responses and information throughout the quiz.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all user inputs are validated, stored securely, and comply with data protection regulations.

subtasks.title: Calculate Product Recommendations
subtasks.description: Develop algorithms to analyze user responses and generate personalized product recommendations.
subtasks.details: Create logic to map user answers to product bundles, ensuring recommendations are accurate and relevant.

subtasks.title: Test and Validate Quiz Flow
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing to ensure the quiz functions correctly, captures data accurately, and integrates seamlessly with other features.
subtasks.details: Perform unit and integration tests to verify all components work as intended, identifying and fixing any issues.

tasks.title: Accessibility and Responsive Testing
tasks.description: Ensure the landing page is accessible and responsive across all devices and browsers.
tasks.details: Conduct thorough testing for accessibility compliance and responsive design. Make necessary adjustments to HTML/CSS to ensure the site is mobile-first and accessible.
tasks.testStrategy: Use accessibility tools and responsive design testing across multiple devices and browsers to verify compliance and usability.

subtasks.title: Conduct Accessibility Audit
subtasks.description: Perform a comprehensive audit of the landing page to identify accessibility issues.
subtasks.details: Utilize tools like WAVE and manual testing to assess compliance with WCAG 2.2 standards. Focus on areas such as color contrast, keyboard navigation, and screen reader compatibility.

subtasks.title: Implement HTML/CSS Adjustments
subtasks.description: Make necessary HTML and CSS changes to address issues identified in the accessibility audit.
subtasks.details: Modify code to improve semantic structure, ensure proper ARIA roles, and enhance keyboard navigability. Adjust color schemes to meet contrast requirements.

subtasks.title: Test Responsiveness Across Devices
subtasks.description: Verify that the landing page displays correctly on various devices and screen sizes.
subtasks.details: Use tools like BrowserStack to test the page on multiple devices, including smartphones, tablets, and desktops. Ensure that the layout adapts appropriately to different screen resolutions.

subtasks.title: Verify Compliance with Accessibility Standards
subtasks.description: Confirm that the landing page meets all relevant accessibility standards after adjustments.
subtasks.details: Re-run accessibility tools and conduct manual testing to ensure compliance with WCAG 2.2 guidelines. Address any remaining issues to achieve full compliance.
